sp.speaker: TV Announcer
sp.speech: It's December 31st, 1999. Let's SAY GOODBYE to the OLD YEAR with a track you all know and love from GLOBAL sensation On-Lyne!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Not again!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Bastard.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: I'm on break, Arthur. Don't mess with my gametime.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Need my Tommy keys, Amir. I'm not letting another lead on Entrati go to waste.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: GruntsThat, that was cheating.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: My keys better not be in that mess.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Learn to hotwire, geez!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Did you take my damn keys?

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Don't distract me, boyscout.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: No disrespect, Quincy. Got places to be, is all.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Someone is taking my stuff.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: How's she doing?

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: If she wasn't your blood, she'd be on her own out there.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Got a lead on Entrati. Sewers. Arse deep in Techrot, most likely. I'm going after him, for all our sakes. Lettie, look, if you've taken my keys again...

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Hold up, hero boy. You're going after Doctor E all by yourself?

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Or maybe you're gonna bail on us, Arthur? Forget it.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: We're in this mess because of you.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: I'm coming too! Guys? Uh... am I sensing some tension here?

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: No one's bailing. I got us into this, and if it kills me, I'll get us- fine. Aoi, Amir, Quincy on backup. Lettie, you and Eleanor hold the fort here, keep the gennies running.

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: The Doktor's dashing patient-zero in the flesh?

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: Shame. But my Scaldra have their orders.

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: Kill. On. Sight.

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: Pity. We could've been allies, kiddo. My Scaldra. Put that thing down!

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Iced 'em. Too slow, Arthur.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: I had it under control.

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: Have it your way. By this time next year, nothing will remain of you slugs.

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: Meet the co-star of your grand finale. An H-04 Efervon Tank. Enjoy.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Requesting assistance!

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: The vents above the treads!

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: Viktor? Drop them in. NOW.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Found a hole in its shield, Arthur!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Thanks, Quincy.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Wake up, brother. He comes. A crownless king, clad in gold. A pallid beast... tap-tap-tapping.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Arthur! What the hell was that? Where are you? Come in!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: He's here. Deep in the Techrot. I'm going after him.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: What in hell...

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Entrati! What devils follow you?

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Bring the hellfire!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: That... was VERY rude.

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: Viktor. That's no way to treat our little tourist.

sp.speaker: Viktor
sp.speech: He won't talk.

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: Oh. Not even to me?

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: Hmph. Not my type.

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: Oh, but we're old friends.

sp.speaker: The Man in the Wall
sp.speech: Aren't we, master?

sp.speaker: The Man in the Wall
sp.speech: Master, my master. Why hast thou abandoned me?

sp.speaker: The Man in the Wall
sp.speech: All that matters is I'm here now. There, there... my faithful man-cat.

sp.speaker: The Man in the Wall
sp.speech: But is it really you? After all these years I've - UGH! Master! You're hurting me!

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: Ha! That's it, isn't it? The poison to your plan.

sp.speaker: The Man in the Wall
sp.speech: And what is that?

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: Love.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Woah. Like Marty McFlea.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: You takin' the piss?

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: If it's bullshit, I'll feed Marty here to the Techrot myself. But the clock's running out.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: The nuke kinda makes sense, actually.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Happy New Year.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Well, you're on point, Marty. But you try any of those head games again and there won't be much left for Lettie to stitch back up. You read me?

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Loud and clear.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Check me out. Givin' kit to Entrati's Cybercop.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Naw. More like V-1000. Sent to smoke us all, am I right?

sp.speaker: TV Announcer
sp.speech: Brrr! We got a blizzard coming in! Well, the On-lyne boys had better get their lip balm ready before the big show, or it's gonna be a chappy New Year!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: So you just puppet this thing? Whole lot of metal in there...

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Arthur's taking a chance on you. You hurt him, and I'll twist you inside out. Try not to scratch the paint.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Lettie, you buying this shit?

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: No, Aoi, I am not.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Cut the chatter. 19 hours til we're popping corks, or vaporized. We get Entrati and put a stop to this.

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: Höllvania. The eve of a new millennium brings with it great change. The war criminal Albrecht Entrati, father of the Techrot plague, has at last been captured. His co-conspirators, the terrorist cell known as 'Hex', will soon be brought to justice. Tonight, we will fill the great... Void of suffering. A New Year... A new era! Höllvania will be great once again!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Right, we're the terrorists. Love what you've done with the place, lady.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Lotta heat here in the opp-block, Arthur. You sure Marty's lead isn't just a setup? You holding something back, heroboy?

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: You wouldn't believe it anyway.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Amir, you said the nuke story made sense. This Y2K shit real?

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Of course it's real. Some glitch in the old control software. Probably written in COBOL.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: ¡Ah chingaoShit!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Holding cells ahead. Big moment for you, Marty.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: He'll be there.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: You better have him. Marty? Is Entrati there?

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: He's gone. It's broken through already. Changing things.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Bollocks! Get your arse out of there! Quincy, Aoi, we need fire support!

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: I told you this was a set-up!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: So what do you want me to do, Lettie?

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Maybe, we cut our losses like we should've done weeks ago. We pack up and get the hell out of this estercolero before it's turned to ash. Just an idea!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: You don't have a problem with a few hundred thousand going up in smoke?

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Anyone still stuck here is Techrot anyway. Sometimes you have to amputate, Aoi. And cauterize.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Didn't come out here to cut an' hide. If Doctor E won't stop this, then I say we do it. Am I right, Amir? AMIR?

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: So where's Entrati? You said this was a loop.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Not anymore, is it? Your Boogeyman changed the rules. You're toast like the rest of us now.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Seems so. But that means we can change it too.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Stop the nuke.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: No one listens.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Get me wired in.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: The Techrot's pumping out spores.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: I don't want more of that shit in my system!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Slow it, Lettie! Amir. Talk to me. Is your plan ready?

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Uh... almost. Just needs a transponder onsite. Any Scaldra console down there should do it.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Hell-Scrubbers! Giant air filters to capture Techrot spores. I've commandeered their deployment system. Just need you to keep them pumping.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Quincy and Marty, keep the air clean while the rest of us search the tunnels for a terminal. You too, Lettie.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: I start turning like Eleanor, I'll be haunting your ass.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: New Hell-Scrubber inbound!

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Likkle Amir knows all about these opps and their systems. A proper boss like you is smart enough to figure it out, innit, Marty?

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Eleanor, you sensing any civilians down here?

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Not one.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: So. Wherever they're hiding out, it's above ground. That's a mercy.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Amir! Found a terminal!

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Coming! What. No no no no no. That's... not a terminal, Arthur. Not any more.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Oh, shit. Aim for the head!

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: See this is why the Major wears a freakin' face mask.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Oh, please. You're as infected as the rest of us, Lettie.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Yeah? Look up 'latent infection', bitch.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Hold. Sensing a Scaldra force on the surface.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Even Scaldra got more sense than to come down here.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: We'll see. Keep us posted.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Amir? You in?

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Root access confirmed. Höllvania Public Utilities I am in you! Huh? MP3s?!-

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: What did you do, Amir? Come in? Comm's dead.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: What is going on?

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Isn't it great? Amir got these from the hack!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Amir! Can't hear myself think!

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Sorry! Got it!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Awww... come on!

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Kalymos?

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: She showed up after the hack. Uh. Look. Marty. Maybe we got off on the wrong-

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Entrati.

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: ...T-T-T-Tenno. If you are seeing this your loop has been altered.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: No kidding.

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: You and I are trapped here. Soon the Murmur will crawl through the cracks and devour this world and its possibilities.

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: Our only means of escape... our only hope to contain this horror I have created... will require a spark of energy rare in this timeline. You know what this means.

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: Do not allow Arthur and the Hex to stop this. I realize what I am asking... but you of all people understand what is at stake. For the sake of everything before and to come... at midnight tonight... the 'bomb' must go off.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: We found him, Marty! Come on!

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Who?

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: We got chatter on Scaldra comms! They've been moving a V.I.P. at regular intervals. It's gotta be Dr. E, right? Meet me across town.

sp.speaker: Viktor
sp.speech: Fences up, Scaldra.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: That convoy's a trap. I doubt Entrati's even on it.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: If there's a chance he's on it, we have to try. Only he can stop this.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Convoy approaching the Mehra Tunnels. That's the place to hit them.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: No air support. Smart.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: I'm just a pretty face, Arthur. Oh sh-

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Arthur, what if he doesn't know?

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Just haul arse to Aoi. Rest of us will catch up.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Get these assholes off my back.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Too. Heavy.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Still not used to... whatever this is. Here. Let's ditch the cycles for something less... conspicuous.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Thaaaank yoooou!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Nice one, Marty!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Wasted!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Pick the bones out of that!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Yeah!!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Eat that, jerk!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Whammo!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: That was a good one!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Hah hah hah hah ha.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Arthur's caught up!

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: So you're the new lapdog, kiddo? Tell me, Toto, what's he done to earn your loyalty?

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: You know this witch!?

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Uh... it's complicated.

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: Not the jealous type! But! If I can't have him... you can't either!

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: Here is the breach. With each cycle, more seeps into her.

sp.speaker: Major Neci Rusalka
sp.speech: Who... who are you?

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: Kill her. Now.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: You do it. I'm not your puppet.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: But it's not really her that's doing this...

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: What? Then how would I be any different?

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: If you cannot sacrifice even this much... how will you do what comes next?

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: What's he talking about, Marty?

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Maybe I won't.

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: Are you more a child than your other? Do you think I am not haunted by these choices?

sp.speaker: The Man in the Wall
sp.speech: XATA FASS XATA.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Wahhh?!?? Marty's legit!

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Nice score you got us here, Arthur. But you know what? I've had by fill of the circus. I'm out.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Quincy... c'mon man! Maybe we don't need Marty to stop this? Don't-

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: -North's your best bet. Mountains might be a chance against the fallout.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Cheers. Look-

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: -Anyone else? No?

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: We'll still follow you, brave king. But this half-assed plan's gone full-guano. Amir's Y2K thing won't even work.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Yeah. I should have said. Controller's air-gapped. Good policy actually.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Air-gapped.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Off net. We'd have to 'full-on' the reactor and patch it direct. Only about four thousand Scaldra to the six of us. Bad odds güey.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Five of us. Arthur, maybe it is time to bail.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: There's an army beneath our feet. You all know it. My loving brother just needs to ask. I know he's itching to.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Eleanor... Arthur, don't you dare. She's barely hanging on as it is.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: You said it yourself, Lettie. Bad odds. Eleanor. I'm asking. Please.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Please? A grand New Year's Eve, indeed. Okey-dokey, Arthur. Who's on point?

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Princess Lucina Zoological Gardens. Free admission on New Year's Eve... if you can get past the Scaldra.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Scaldra think they've contained the outbreak here. But the Techrot here is different... more... patient... Biding their time...

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: They can do that?

sp.speaker: Viktor
sp.speech: Bad form to arrive early. And without your mystery date? I thought they taught Britannic men better...

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Viktor, you love this city. Y2K is gonna haywire the plant. Call off your dogs for the night and help us.

sp.speaker: Viktor
sp.speech: Y2K? Ozone? Acid rain? And I took you for a warrior. Air support, you are go for drop.

sp.speaker: Viktor
sp.speech: Mediocre display. Not worth my time. Enjoy your picnic in the park, children.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Wait here. I do this alone.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: I'm sorry we put you up to this.

sp.speaker: Legacyte
sp.speech: We've waited. Our Severed. Sister.

sp.speaker: Legacyte
sp.speech: I Queen of these. First sister from trees.

sp.speaker: Legacyte
sp.speech: Sisters. Wicked. Always jealous to be queen.

sp.speaker: Legacyte
sp.speech: Bad. Mad. Sad.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: She won't come back from this.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Then none of us will.

sp.speaker: Legacyte
sp.speech: Mine! Me! Mine!

sp.speaker: Legacyte
sp.speech: Me. Help. You. Many friends!

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Many friends. Yes.

sp.speaker: Legacyte
sp.speech: Many.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Less one.

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: Are you more a child than your other? Do you think I am not haunted by these choices?

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Entrati?! Get me out of here!

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Shoot us in the back-

sp.speaker: Indifference
sp.speech: Eleanor is the first to die.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Eleanor!

sp.speaker: Indifference
sp.speech: Then Lettie.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Peak-a-boo.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: See ya soon, momma.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: I've seen enough, Albrecht!

sp.speaker: Indifference
sp.speech: Not that old dog. This is me.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Arthur! I can't-

sp.speaker: Indifference
sp.speech: These gifts you have: a piece of me. Given freely.

sp.speaker: Indifference
sp.speech: But those before you were butchers. Flayed flesh... for stolen stars.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: I was... Too. Slow.

sp.speaker: Indifference
sp.speech: But those before you. They did not ask. They butchered me. My flesh fed their greed.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Just... go.

sp.speaker: On-lyne
sp.speech: ZekeHow are we doin' Holvaniaahhhhhhh?!?!!DJ ROMWe can't heeeear you!ZekeYo, sounds like someone's tryna kick off the party without us!HarddriveNo way, man! Ain't no party 'til I show up!DrillbitLet's show 'em how it's really done!PacketHöllvania, you ever been in love?DrillbitAnd who's had their heart broken? We feel you. But trust me— stay strong. Time heals everything. And I know you know it, right? 'Cause love... is time.

xml.info: HELL. YOU ARE NEVER GETTING OUT

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Arthur, this place is swarming with Scaldra!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Hold there. She'll get it open.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Eleanor? You still okay?

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: We are fine.

sp.speaker: Viktor
sp.speech: What's going on down there. Eight-squad? Eight-squad report! Get Efervon units down there now!

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Children! NO!!

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Eleanor, hold here. I'll clear the gas.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Eleanor!

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Shoot us in the back, Lettie?

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Making sure that you are still... you.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Of course, we are.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: And you can be, too.

sp.speaker: Scaldra Eradicator
sp.speech: Sir, the sub-floors have been breached. Requesting backup!

sp.speaker: Viktor
sp.speech: No! This is what they want. Hold!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: What the hell? Wait... Quincy?!

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: You are proper shit at directions, Arthur. Heads down while I do my job, arright mate?

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Got ya.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Peak-a-boo.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Show off. Better make a move, though. They'll get on you.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: I'm seeing this through.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Go! I got this.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: See ya soon, momma.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Don't have time for this!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Tell me you got this.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: I can only type so fast!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Uh. Is that supposed to happen?

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Amir?! Aoi, can you do something?

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: What do you want me to do?

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: I dunno, hold them in!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Aoi! Stop!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Arthur! I can't! I can't! Arthur! Ar-!

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: I was... Too. Slow.

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: He's ash in seconds. No need for misery. Come. Now.

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: Murmur expelled. Tau is in sight. They've given their lives for this. Make it count.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Just... go.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: No. I can save them.

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: Not unless you know them.

xml.message: “The triumph of the Indifference falls in snow and ash as the shattered corpses of The Hex lie in the midwinter cold.Only the Drifter's spirit refuses to accept that the story is over. Somehow, the Hex are the key. But once the circle has been broken, what can heal it again?”

“What happened?Drifter,I can make no sense at all of these readings. Your site of temporal injection has somehow shifted. Your loop now encompasses the entire year of 1999.Albrecht's interference is to blame, no doubt. What does he feel you need more time to achieve? He surely must have given guidance, however cryptic!I can offer one service, at least. I discovered a clandestine blueprint among Albrecht's personal effects, for a Warframe so secret it was never named. It is yours.Loid”
xml.infoMarked: Attachments: Cyte-09 Blueprint, Magnetic Might, Forma
xml.message: “A Missive From His Majesty DOMINUS THRAXTo the erstwhile traitor and conspirator known by the alias 'Drifter':That profane monstrosity of which the Scholar spoke has sought to claim our throne. It wears a face and puppets a body that knows you.We have confined it in the Apocrypha, the realm of Untold Stories, but you now have a duty to keep it there.If it gains sufficient power, its story will supplant ours!Seek its heretical tale, 'The Triumph of Dust'. Sever it from the true tales of Duviri.His Radiant and Eternal Majesty,DOMINUS THRAX”
“Strengthen your connection to the Hex members before revisiting the New Year's Eve disaster.”

sp.speaker: The Hex
sp.speech: We're not gonna make it man! I don't... have... time. Maybe, we cut our losses like we should have done weeks ago. What's he talking about, Marty? I told you this was a set-up!. I can't! I can't! I can't!

sp.speaker: Indifference
sp.speech: Eleanor is the first to die.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Shoot us in the back-

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Eleanor? You still okay?

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: We are fine.

sp.speaker: Viktor
sp.speech: What's going on down there. Eight-squad? Eight-squad report! Get Efervon units down there now!

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Children! NO!!

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Eleanor, hold here. I'll clear the gas.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Eleanor!

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Shoot us in the back, Lettie?

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Making sure that you are still... you.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: Of course, we are.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: And you can be, too.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Eleanor, only here to help. It's up to you.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Eleanor... Eleanor!

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: I'm here.

sp.speaker: Indifference
sp.speech: And I thought we were becoming friends.

sp.speaker: Scaldra Eradicator
sp.speech: Sir, the sub-floors have been breached. Requesting backup!

sp.speaker: Viktor
sp.speech: No! This is what they want. Hold!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: What the hell? Wait... Quincy?!

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: You are proper shit at directions, Arthur. Heads down while I do my job, arright mate?

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Pop.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Got ya.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Peak-a-boo.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Show off. Better make a move, though. They'll get on you.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: I'm seeing this through.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Go! I got this.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: See?

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Yeah. Yeah, I do.

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Not today, momma. Area secure. Godspeed, Amir!

sp.speaker: Indifference
sp.speech: Did you forget? Albrecht's going to burn them all anyway!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Tell me you got this.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: I can only type so fast!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Uh. Is that supposed to happen?

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Amir?! Aoi, can you do something?

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: What do you want me to do?

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: I dunno, hold them in!

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Aoi! Stop!

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Arthur! I can't! I can't! Arthur! Ar-!

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: You can. You're strong enough.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Oh. Oh!

sp.speaker: Indifference
sp.speech: None of this matters.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Then why are you trying so hard to stop me?

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: We're not gonna make it man. I can't even compile in time-

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: -Then we go down swinging!

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Not now. Not now.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Amir, slow it down.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: I don't... have... time.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Hold out your hand.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Just... go. Mmm... dnnne.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Entrati...

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Bailed.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Sorry... mbout yur hnnd.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Wha- are you-? Wait. nooo.

sp.speaker: Drifter
sp.speech: Hey, let's get out of here, Arthur. Both of us. Okay?

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: Okay.

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: Your heart would struggle to move them. It had to grow...

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: ...the only way it ever does...

sp.speaker: Albrecht Entrati
sp.speech: ...with others. Carry this power with mercy, Tenno.

sp.speaker: Arthur
sp.speech: What a day.

sp.speaker: Amir
sp.speech: Well that burned a few calories!

sp.speaker: Quincy
sp.speech: Man ain't nothin' without his mains. Respec'.

sp.speaker: Aoi
sp.speech: Right here by your side. Now and always.

sp.speaker: Eleanor
sp.speech: I'm not afraid to die... but I'm glad I didn't.

sp.speaker: Lettie
sp.speech: Hey! After this we go for dinner.

xml.message: “The Hex are united and the reactor is safe. History now follows a new course.”
